ProfessionalHero.headline: Focus on people, we'll handle the rest.
ProfessionalHero.description: Join our space and let us handle the administrative work. Connect with clients who match your expertise, optimize your practice, and grow your impact.

MatchingSystem.title: Find Clients Who Are Right for You
MatchingSystem.subtitle: Save time and energy with our intelligent matching system. Focus on the clinical aspects of your practice while we connect you with clients who align perfectly with your expertise and preferences.
MatchingSystem.issueTypeDesc: Match with clients based on the specific mental health challenges you specialize in treating
MatchingSystem.therapeuticApproachDesc: Connect with clients who prefer your therapeutic methods and techniques
MatchingSystem.ageCategoryDesc: Work with the age groups you're most experienced and comfortable with
MatchingSystem.expertiseDesc: Leverage your unique competencies to help those who need them most
MatchingSystem.benefitDesc: Our precision matching means you spend less time on administrative tasks and more time doing what you love—providing quality mental health care. Every client connection is tailored to your professional strengths and preferences.

PlatformBenefits.title: Space Benefits for Professionals
PlatformBenefits.subtitle: We provide comprehensive support so you can focus on what matters most—delivering exceptional mental health care to your clients.
PlatformBenefits.simpleManagementDesc: Provide us with your available time slots, meet your clients, and we handle the rest—scheduling, billing, and administrative tasks.
PlatformBenefits.stabilizePracticeDesc: Maintain a consistent client base and steady revenue stream. Focus on growth without worrying about fluctuating income.
PlatformBenefits.optimizeTimeDesc: Concentrate on clinical aspects of your practice and free up time for your personal life. We handle the business side.
PlatformBenefits.practiceToolsDesc: Access OWL Practice-style features including record keeping, scheduling, billing, and payroll management—all in one place.
PlatformBenefits.virtualLibraryDesc: Unlimited access to PDF books, research articles, psychological tests, and test correction platforms when needed.
PlatformBenefits.contentDevelopmentDesc: Get help creating podcasts, videos, and articles to expand your reach and generate additional revenue streams.
PlatformBenefits.professionalDevDesc: Free training programs and receive a note-taking tablet after completing a certain number of sessions.
PlatformBenefits.startupKitDesc: New psychologists receive comprehensive startup assistance and mentorship from experienced professionals.
PlatformBenefits.supervisionDesc: Get access to professional supervision when you need it, included in your membership at no extra cost.
PlatformBenefits.communityDesc: Join support groups for mutual aid, reflection, clinical discussions, and professional community building.
PlatformBenefits.psychiatryDesc: Access discussions with psychiatrists through our partnership with Averroes for comprehensive patient care.
PlatformBenefits.financialDesc: Preferential rates with accountants, OPQ membership fee support based on sessions, and investment fund opportunities.
PlatformBenefits.perk1: Become a shareholder and collectively benefit from our success
PlatformBenefits.perk2: $1 per session contribution to an investment fund

faq1.question: How do I book an appointment?
faq1.answer: You can book an appointment by going to the Appointments section in your dashboard and selecting an available time slot with your preferred professional.

faq2.question: How do I cancel or reschedule an appointment?
faq2.answer: To cancel or reschedule, go to your Appointments section, find the appointment you want to modify, and click on the Cancel or Reschedule button. Please note that cancellations should be made at least 24 hours in advance.

hero.headline: At Je chemine, we believe that everyone deserves human, confidential, and personalized support tailored to their reality.
hero.description1: Our mission is to support your emotional and psychological well-being through a personalized journey designed to meet your unique needs and pace. We offer simple and caring access to a team of experts whose practice is regulated, recognized, and compliant with their professional order requirements.
hero.description2: Whatever your situation, you are accompanied by a qualified professional, ready to walk with you towards a more serene, balanced, and fulfilling life.

commitment.title: Our Commitment
commitment.description1: With Je chemine, you are no longer alone. We are here to support you, guide you, and help you journey towards a more serene, balanced, and fulfilling life.
commitment.description2: Our space offers a simple, human, and secure gateway to take care of your mental health – for you or your family – while giving you access to relevant tools, clear information, and reliable professional support.

expertise.title: Ethics, rigor, and confidentiality at the heart of every interaction.
expertise.description1: We are committed to protecting your privacy and personal information in accordance with current regulations, including Bill 25. Every intervention is based on rigorous standards and deep respect for your dignity.
expertise.description2: Whether you consult a psychologist, psychotherapist, or other professional, you have the certainty of being accompanied by a qualified expert, recognized by their professional order.

confidentiality.title: Respect for Confidentiality
confidentiality.description: Strict protection of your sensitive information and respect for ethical standards.

quality.title: Professional Quality
quality.description: Regulated practices, rigorous supervision, and continuous training for each practitioner.

personalizedJourney.title: Your journey is unique, your support is too.
personalizedJourney.description: Our matching process aims to connect you with the professional who best suits your reality. Each meeting is designed to facilitate lasting engagement and promote the success of your therapeutic journey.
personalizedJourney.goal: The goal: build a strong therapeutic relationship adapted to your needs.

accessibility.title: A space designed to adapt to your daily life.
accessibility.description: We know your reality is unique. Je chemine makes help accessible according to your preferences, so you can move forward at your own pace, wherever you are.

remote.title: Remote Consultations
remote.description: Secure video calls to support you, whether you're at home, traveling, or in a remote area.
remote.details: No more geographical barriers, no more logistical obstacles.

office.title: Office Consultations
office.description: A warm and professional welcome for those who prefer direct human contact.
office.details: Spaces designed for your comfort, confidentiality, and well-being.

choice.title: Professional Choice
choice.description: You remain in control: find the specialist who suits you and build a solid therapeutic relationship.
choice.details: Our space offers you transparent profiles and support to make the right choice.

hero.headline: A complete ecosystem of mental health services for adults, children, families, and schools.
hero.description: We bring together qualified professionals and specialized programs to support each person at every stage of their journey. Discover how we can support you and your family.

foundations.title: Our Foundations
items: A simple and reassuring space to track your journey

therapySpectrum.title: Services dedicated to adults, children, couples, and families.
therapySpectrum.description: We offer a comprehensive range of mental health services designed to support every member of your family. Each service is delivered by qualified professionals who tailor their approach to your unique needs.
therapySpectrum.imageAlt: Diverse group of people receiving mental health support

adult.title: Adult Psychotherapy
adult.description: Support for depression, anxiety, post-traumatic stress, obsessive-compulsive disorders, panic disorder, ADHD (assessment & follow-up), emotional management, self-esteem, relationship challenges, and life transition adaptation.

child.title: Child & Adolescent Psychotherapy
child.description: Targeted interventions for learning difficulties, behavioral disorders, ADHD, anxiety, oppositional defiant disorder, emotional management, social relationships, and self-esteem.

family.title: Family Therapy
family.description: Understanding dynamics, restoring communication, and building a more harmonious climate to move forward together.

couple.title: Couple Therapy
couple.description: Navigate conflicts, strengthen connection, communicate better, and build a respectful and stable relationship.

parenting.title: Parental Coaching
parenting.description: Support to better understand your child's development, manage behavioral challenges, emotions, positive guidance, and continuity between school and home.

workplace.title: Workplace Mental Health
workplace.description: Specialized support for burnout, return-to-work transitions, and professional difficulties. We help you navigate work-related stress, rebuild confidence after leave, and develop sustainable strategies for a healthier work-life balance.

schoolAnxiety.title: School Anxiety Support
schoolAnxiety.description: Targeted interventions for children and adolescents experiencing school-related anxiety, including performance anxiety, social fears, school refusal, and transition difficulties. We work with the child, family, and school to create a supportive environment.

workplaceSection.title: Specialized support for work-related challenges
workplaceSection.description: We support employees in managing burnout, return-to-work transitions, and developing sustainable strategies to maintain a healthy work-life balance.

programs.title: Comprehensive Mental Health Programs
programs.subtitle: Explore the features and benefits of each program. Our integrated approach ensures you receive personalized care tailored to your unique needs.

adult.title: Adult Psychotherapy
adult.description: Mental health support for adults facing life's challenges. From anxiety and depression to relationship issues and life transitions, our professionals provide personalized therapeutic care.
features: Individual therapy sessions with licensed psychologists.

child.title: Child & Adolescent Psychotherapy
child.description: Specialized therapeutic support designed for the unique developmental needs of children and teenagers. We help young people navigate emotional challenges, behavioral difficulties, and developmental transitions.

family.title: Family & Couple Therapy
family.description: Strengthen family bonds and improve communication through guided therapeutic sessions. We help families and couples navigate conflicts, rebuild trust, and create healthier relationship dynamics.

workplace.title: Workplace Mental Health
workplace.description: Specialized support for work-related mental health challenges. We help professionals navigate burnout, manage return-to-work transitions, and develop sustainable strategies for career well-being.

schoolAnxiety.title: School Anxiety Support
schoolAnxiety.description: Targeted interventions for children and adolescents experiencing school-related anxiety. We work collaboratively with the child, family, and school to create a supportive environment for academic and emotional success.
features: Social anxiety and peer relationship support.
Test anxiety and academic stress coping.

sentiersProgram.title: A space dedicated to children, adolescents, families, and schools.
sentiersProgram.description: The Sentiers program offers comprehensive support that combines clinical expertise, educational tools, and close collaboration with the school environment.
sentiersProgram.studentTrack: Student Track (CEGEP & University): support adapted to the pace, academic requirements, and mental health of students.

assessment.title: Complete School Assessment
assessment.description: Tests, observations, and analyses to understand the learning profile and specific needs.

iep.title: Intervention Plans (IEP)
iep.description: Collaborative design of individualized plans with clear and measurable objectives.

collaboration.title: Clinical Analysis & School-Family Collaboration
collaboration.description: An interdisciplinary team working with teachers, administrators, and parents.

support.title: Individualized Support
support.description: Psychosocial follow-up, parental coaching, ADHD/anxiety/learning guidance, classroom interventions.

sentiersProgram.customSupport: Tailored support to promote success, self-esteem, and well-being for young people, in partnership with their school and family environment.
sentiersProgram.networkDescription: School teams, practitioners, family: we work together to implement the best strategies.

complementaryServices.title: Resources to go further, at your own pace.

adhd.title: ADHD Assessment (adult & child)
adhd.description: Complete process with recommendations, follow-ups, interventions, and adaptation strategies for school, home, and work.

selfLearning.title: Self-Learning & Educational Resources
selfLearning.description: Free access to tools to start your journey: psychoeducation, breathing exercises, guided meditations, issue understanding sheets.

paidContent.title: Specialized Paid Content
paidContent.description: Thematic programs, specialized videos, workshops, content created by our professionals, podcasts, articles, and capsules to deepen your learning.

modelWorks.title: Why Our Model Works
modelWorks.description: Whether you're taking the first step or continuing an already started follow-up, Je chemine offers you a reliable space to move forward.
reasons: A simple, reassuring, and secure space

hero.headline: An approach built around you, by experts who listen and adapt to your reality.
hero.description: Every support is unique. We combine a deeply human approach with recognized clinical practices to build a tailored journey, respectful of your story, goals, and pace.

respect.title: Respect for the Person
respect.description: You are at the heart of the process, never in an imposed model.

rigor.title: Clinical Rigor
rigor.description: Validated approaches, regulated and continuously updated.

trust.title: Trust and Safety
trust.description: An ethical, confidential, and reassuring framework to move forward.

personCentered.title: We adapt our support to your needs, not the other way around.

personCentered.note: Inspired by our personalized journey concept: a unique approach, continuous adjustments, evolving support.

mindfulness.title: Mindfulness / Mindful Awareness

psychoeducation.title: Psychoeducation

integrativeApproach.title: Integrative Approach
integrativeApproach.description: A combination of different psychological techniques and theories adapted to each person's unique needs, rather than being limited to a single approach.

ethics.title: We protect your trust, at every moment.
ethics.description: Confidentiality is not an option, it's our foundation. We designed our space and processes to ensure maximum protection of your privacy, from the first contact to the closure of your file.
ethics.note: Each professional is a signatory to specific commitments regarding data protection and benefits from ongoing training on confidentiality.

ethics.title: Respect for Ethical Rules
ethics.description: Our practitioners respect the ethical codes of their professional orders and ensure the protection of your dignity.

law25.title: Compliance with Bill 25

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: Client Services Usage Policy – Je chemine Platform

blocks.paragraph: The Je chemine platform is a space dedicated to supporting mental health. It provides a technological infrastructure enabling the connection between clients and qualified professionals for psychological consultation and assessment services.
It is understood that Je chemine acts exclusively as a technical intermediary.

bullets.text: ensuring the proper operation of the tools for appointment booking, payment, receipts, and self-learning.
each professional is solely responsible for their clinical acts, professional judgment, assessments, and the quality of their follow-up.

the platform does not manage, store, or access any clinical records. The keeping and preservation of records (progress notes, assessment reports, raw data, etc.) rest exclusively with the professional, in accordance with the standards of their respective professional order.
the user agrees to provide accurate information and to maintain the confidentiality of their credentials.
the account is strictly personal. The user is responsible for any activity carried out under their account.

blocks.paragraph: All elements that make up the platform (texts, logos, graphics, journey tools, videos, software, etc.) are the exclusive property of Je chemine.

bullets.text: The user benefits from a limited, non-exclusive, and non-transferable license for personal use.
Any unauthorized reproduction, extraction, or distribution is strictly prohibited.

sections.title: 5. Integrity and security of the platform

blocks.paragraph: The user agrees not to damage the platform. The following are strictly prohibited:

bullets.text: any attempt to intrude or hack into the system;
the introduction of viruses or malicious code;
any action that could overload or damage Je chemine's technical infrastructure.
the platform encrypts communications. However, the user is responsible for ensuring they are in a private environment and for taking steps to protect their data.
it is strictly forbidden to record communications without the explicit written consent of a platform member.
professional secrecy binds the client and the mental health professional.
the client acknowledges that the initial assessment process, aimed at properly directing the client, follows rigorous protocols under the responsibility of a platform member.
cancellation policies and associated fees are determined by the platform's conditions and agreements with the professional.
payments are made via the platform (credit card, Interac transfer, or pre-authorized bank debit agreement). The platform is responsible for issuing official consultation receipts.

blocks.callout: IMPORTANT: The Je chemine platform is not an emergency response service. In the event of a suicidal crisis or immediate danger to yourself or others, you must immediately contact your local emergency services (e.g., 911) or go to the nearest emergency room.

blocks.paragraph: Any breach of these policies, in particular abusive behavior toward a professional or an administrative member, or any attempt to damage the platform, may result in the suspension or permanent closure of the account without notice.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Je chemine Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Je chemine, we are committed to protecting your privacy and the confidentiality of your personal information. This privacy policy is intended to inform you of our practices regarding the collection, use, processing, and retention of the personal and confidential information we gather when you use our services, visit our website, or interact with us. We strictly comply with applicable laws, including the Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector, the laws of the province of Quebec and the federal laws of Canada, including the Act to modernize legislative provisions as regards the protection of personal information (the Applicable Laws) and the regulations of the OPQ.

blocks.paragraph: This policy governs the collection, use, and retention of information obtained by Je chemine regarding individuals who access, use, or communicate with our services (the “users” or “you”). Your use of our services is also subject to our terms of use. If you do not consent to these terms, please do not use our services.

“Personal information” is any information that identifies you or could be associated with you, such as your name, telephone number, home address, email, date of birth, gender, information about your employment or education, your psychiatric and medical history, and any other information that must be treated as “personal information” in accordance with the Applicable Laws. This also includes your payment details.

sections.title: Why and how do we collect your information?

blocks.paragraph: We collect and use your personal information for the following reasons:

bullets.term: Access to and use of services
bullets.text: to enable you to access and use our services appropriately, including processing your appointment and inquiry requests.

to manage service requests, assign you to an appropriate professional, and ensure appointment follow-up (reminders, confirmations, intake forms). This information is stored on secure, encrypted servers.
during your first appointment, we collect information to facilitate the assessment and matching with a professional.
to process your payments and send you invoices through our secure billing system. No credit card information is directly retained by Je chemine.
to enable professionals and clients to communicate via secure, encrypted messaging servers and to provide virtual services through private web conferencing solutions.
to send you marketing communications (newsletters, etc.), based on your choice.
to evaluate, optimize, and improve the content, features, and delivery of our services and website.
to manage the client relationship, generate mailing lists, and produce internal reports.
if you apply for a position, to evaluate your application and manage our recruitment needs.
to address reported issues, perform troubleshooting, support, and security reviews.

blocks.paragraph: We use personal information only for the purposes for which it was collected and, as a general rule, will ask for your permission for any other use.

When you access our service, your computer and our server automatically exchange data (Internet service provider identification, IP address, type of browser and operating system, pages visited, date and time, referring site address). This information is collected for statistical and technological purposes and is not considered identifiable personal information.

We use cookies to facilitate navigation and optimize the user experience, as well as audience analytics solutions such as Google Analytics to collect aggregated statistical data (pages viewed, duration of visit, etc.). Your IP address is anonymized to protect your privacy. You may configure your browser to block cookies, but this may limit some features.

All personal information is stored on servers in Canada with high-security safeguards, protected against improper use and unauthorized access. We implement physical, administrative, and technical security measures, such as two-factor authentication for all involved systems (electronic practice management software, encrypted messaging, online billing). Your personal information is only accessible to employees or agents who need it to fulfill their responsibilities.

While we deploy commercially reasonable measures, we cannot guarantee absolute security. In the event of a privacy incident (phishing, identity theft), we will act quickly to mitigate the risks and notify you if significant harm is likely or required by law.

sections.title: Limits on collection, use, and disclosure

blocks.paragraph: Except as otherwise indicated in this policy, we never disclose your personal information to anyone outside Je chemine without your explicit written consent. However, we may share your information with:

bullets.text: who help us deliver our services (payment processing, data storage, customer support, marketing). We require these third parties to apply similar security measures and to use your information only for the purposes we determine.
to support our business operations and integrate products and services (e.g., Microsoft Cloud Solutions Provider, Google Suite, Google Cloud).
in the event of a sale or transfer of all or part of our business, your personal information may be disclosed for the purposes of that transaction.

bullets.term: Compliance with and enforcement of laws
bullets.text: we may disclose information to the government, law enforcement, or private parties if required by law, by legal process, or to protect our rights, safety, property, or those of others, or to prevent fraudulent or illegal activities.

blocks.paragraph: There are important limits to our confidentiality obligations in specific situations: imminent danger (suicide, serious injury, abuse or neglect of a child or elderly person), risk of a child running away, dangerous driving of a motor vehicle, requests by parents/guardians for a child under 14, or access required for our administrative staff.

Je chemine retains personal information for as long as necessary to provide our services, manage our activities, and comply with our legal and regulatory obligations (notably a period of five years from the date of the last professional service provided, in accordance with professional standards). After this period, we ensure its anonymization or destruction.

You have the right to access, modify, or delete the personal information we hold about you, and to correct any errors, subject to the exceptions provided by law. Requests for access or correction must be made in writing. We undertake to respond within 30 days, and administrative fees may apply.

You may also withdraw your consent to the retention, use, or disclosure of your personal information at any time, by contacting us. We will process your request within 30 days, but please note that this may affect our ability to provide you with certain services.

Our website may contain links to third-party sites or platforms. By using or activating these links, you leave our site, and your navigation is then subject to those third parties' privacy policies. We exercise no control over these platforms and disclaim any responsibility for their personal information practices.
This policy may be updated occasionally to reflect legislative changes or changes in our practices. The updated version will be published on our website and will take effect upon publication.

For any question or comment regarding this policy, to update or correct your personal information, or to file a complaint, please contact the person responsible for privacy protection at Je chemine: SASSI ESSID, Psychologist — sassiessid1@gmail.com.
This person is also responsible for informing affected individuals in the event of a privacy incident and for notifying the Commission d'accès à l'information du Québec when required.

professionalTerms.title: Professional Terms of Use
professionalTerms.subtitle: Terms of Use for Professionals – Je chemine Platform
professionalTerms.intro: The Je chemine platform acts as an administrative agent and a technological intermediary. By joining the platform, the professional accepts the following terms governing their practice within the Je chemine ecosystem.

blocks.paragraph: The professional certifies and undertakes to:

bullets.text: be a member in good standing of a professional order recognized in Quebec (e.g., OPQ, OTSTCFQ, etc.) and hold the permits necessary to practice psychotherapy or helping relationships.
maintain at all times valid professional liability insurance covering their practice, including services provided via telepractice.

strictly comply with the codes of ethics of their profession. The platform may in no case be used to circumvent ethical obligations (record keeping, professional secrecy, professional obligations, professional responsibilities, etc.).

blocks.paragraph: To optimize the platform's matching system:

bullets.text: the professional must complete a comprehensive form (training, approaches, areas of expertise, target clienteles, preferences, etc.) and ensure this information is truthful.
any modification of skills or availability must be made by the professional through their account.
the professional may, at their sole discretion and without notice, suspend receiving new referrals or cease accepting cases on the platform.
once a therapeutic process has begun with a client referred by Je chemine, the professional has a professional and contractual obligation to complete the follow-up.
any end of follow-up must be clinically justified or subject to an appropriate referral, in accordance with practice standards, to ensure user safety.
any client initially accepted under the agreement with Je chemine must remain within the platform for the entire duration of the follow-up.

the professional is strictly prohibited from soliciting or agreeing to continue follow-up with a referred client outside the Je chemine system. Any follow-up arrangement must be validated and administratively processed by the platform.

blocks.paragraph: The professional acknowledges that, in the course of their collaboration with Je chemine, they have access to sensitive, strategic, and confidential information. Accordingly, the professional undertakes to:

bullets.text: keep strictly confidential the terms of their agreement with the platform, including but not limited to: agreed-upon rates and fees (whether fixed or preferential); the internal workings and mechanisms of the smart-matching algorithm; the specific administrative terms and operational processes of the platform.
not disclose to any third party (colleagues, other professionals, clients, or competing platforms) the benefits received, rebates, or any special condition granted by Je chemine.
refrain from sharing any documentation, screenshots of the professional interface, or internal communications that could harm the platform's competitiveness.
this confidentiality obligation remains in force for the entire duration of the professional's membership and survives the termination of the agreement for a period of 5 years.
any breach of this confidentiality clause may result in the immediate termination of access to services, without prejudice to the damages remedies the platform may pursue.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: Your Privacy on Je chemine
cookies.intro: To make your experience on Je chemine as smooth and personalized as possible, we use cookies (also known as connection tokens). This page explains, with full transparency, how we take care of your data in compliance with Quebec's Law 25.

sections.title: What is a cookie and why is it there?

blocks.paragraph: A cookie is a small note that our site leaves in your browser. It allows us to recognize you from one page to the next. Without it, the site would forget who you are as soon as you click on a new module!
We use two types of cookies:

bullets.text: they disappear as soon as you close your browser.
they remain for a period of time to remember your preferences on your next visit.

sections.title: How we use cookies to help you

blocks.paragraph: On Je chemine, our cookies have specific purposes:

bullets.text: they are the engine of the site. They allow us to secure your account, validate your login, and protect your information from intruders. Without them, the platform simply cannot function.
they remember your choices, such as your preferred language or where you left off in your journey, so you don't have to start over.

we use tools like Google Analytics to understand which sections of the platform are most appreciated. This data reaches us in an aggregated and anonymous form to help us create better content for you.

sections.title: An extra layer of protection: your IP address

blocks.paragraph: To protect the Je chemine community from cyberattacks, we monitor IP addresses. Think of it as having a security guard at the entrance: it allows us to block malicious behavior while keeping the door wide open for legitimate users.

sections.title: You stay in control of your journey

blocks.paragraph: It's your journey, and you decide what traces you leave.

bullets.text: you can block cookies in your browser settings.
if you disable all cookies, some Je chemine features may no longer work correctly, such as keeping you logged in.

blocks.callout: For any questions about our use of cookies or your personal data, contact us at info@jechemine.com.

emergencyConditions.title: Quick one-time consultation conditions
emergencyConditions.subtitle: Please read before requesting
emergencyConditions.intro: A quick one-time consultation (« consultation ponctuelle rapide ») is a priority request for people who need to be seen rapidly but are not in a life-threatening situation. Please review the conditions below before submitting your request.

sections.title: This is not an emergency service

blocks.paragraph: Je chemine is not a real-time crisis or emergency service. If you or a loved one are in immediate danger or having suicidal thoughts, call 911, or 988 (Suicide Crisis Helpline, available 24/7), or 1-866-277-3553 (1-866-APPELLE) in Quebec.
This option is intended for situations that require prompt attention — heightened distress, a sudden deterioration, or a time-sensitive need — without constituting a medical or psychiatric emergency.

bullets.text: your request is flagged to our team as urgent and triaged ahead of standard requests.
a professional aims to take charge of your file within 24 hours and to confirm the appointment within 12 hours of accepting it.
this is a single, focused session; ongoing follow-up can be arranged separately afterwards.

blocks.paragraph: The usual consultation fees apply. The exact amount and payment terms are confirmed during booking.
